analysis.consistency: High. The entry is complete, containing all standard D&D 5e spell components (slug, name, level, school, ritual, casting_time, range, components, duration, description, classes).
analysis.quality: High. The description is well-formatted and clearly explains the spell's mechanical effects, including the duration, capacity (8 creatures), and the defensive/isolation properties of the extradimensional space.

mechanics.level_appropriateness: 2nd level seems appropriate for creating a secure, temporary, hidden extradimensional safe haven.
mechanics.action_economy: 1 action for setup, 1 hour duration is standard for utility.
mechanics.limitations_and_interactions: The explicit limitation that 'Attacks and spells can't cross through the entrance' is crucial and well-defined. The sensory limitation (seeing out of a 3x5 window) balances the perfect concealment.
mechanics.component_notes: The material component (powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment) is flavor-appropriate for a conjuration/transmutation trick.

analysis.suggested_changes: None required. The data is pristine and complete.
